queries.question: In descending order of out of pocket expenses, list the surgical procedures.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?description ?outofpocketexpense WHERE {
  ?surgicalprocedures a :SurgicalProcedures .
  ?surgicalprocedures p:Description ?description .
  ?surgicalprocedures p:OutOfPocketExpense ?outofpocketexpense .
  ?surgicalprocedures p:OutOfPocketExpense ?outofpocketexpense_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?outofpocketexpense_o)

queries.question: What are the surgical procedures listed in descending order of cost?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?description ?insurancecovered WHERE {
  ?surgicalprocedures a :SurgicalProcedures .
  ?surgicalprocedures p:Description ?description .
  ?surgicalprocedures p:InsuranceCovered ?insurancecovered .
  ?surgicalprocedures p:InsuranceCovered ?insurancecovered_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?insurancecovered_o)

queries.question: What are the surgical procedures listed in descending order of cost?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?description ?insurancecovered ?outofpocketexpense WHERE {
  ?surgicalprocedures a :SurgicalProcedures .
  ?surgicalprocedures p:Description ?description .
  ?surgicalprocedures p:InsuranceCovered ?insurancecovered .
  ?surgicalprocedures p:OutOfPocketExpense ?outofpocketexpense .
  ?surgicalprocedures p:InsuranceCovered ?insurancecovered_o .
  ?surgicalprocedures p:OutOfPocketExpense ?outofpocketexpense_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?insurancecovered_o) DESC(?outofpocketexpense_o)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the surgical procedures listed in descending order of cost?
